creator: deischen@iworks.InterWorks.org
text:
Updated xmcd port to not configure a CD-ROM device when
	PACKAGE_BUILDING is defined.  Configuring a CD-ROM device
	requires operator action.

	The update also brought in the latest xmcd port which has
	the same version number as the last port (xmcd-2.1).

Fix: Port included below (uuencoded).

How-To-Repeat: 
	NA
